stemHtml: According to ICAO Annex 6, Part I, the definition of "flight time for aeroplanes" is…

options.a: The time from when the pilot commences the take-off roll by applying take-off thrust until reaching taxi speed following landing.
options.b: The total time from the moment an aeroplane first moves for the purpose of taking-off until the moment it finally comes to rest at the end of the flight.
options.c: The time from when the aeroplane leaves the ground until the moment it touches down at the destination.
options.d: The time from the moment the engines are started until the moment they are shut down at the end of the flight.
